sections.paragraph:
( Dan 3:28) imp. הַב Dan 5:17 part. act. יָהֵב, pass. יְהִיב, pret. pass. יְהִיבַת, יְהִיבוּ Dan 7:11, 12 Ezr 5:14 fut. and inf. are borrowed from נְתַן, comp. Syr. ܝܗ̱ܰܒ, fut. ܢܶܬܶܓ from ܢܬܰܓ = נְתַן. Ch. i.q. Heb.

(1) to give. Dan 2:37, 38 , 48 , to deliver, to give over, Dan 3:28 7:11 .

(2) to place, to lay (a foundation), Ezr 5:16.

Ithpeal, אִתְיְהֵב fut. יִתְיְהֵב, part. מִתְיְהֵב, to be given, or delivered, Dan 4:13 7:25 , etc.
